# National strategy for a sustainable trail system

Contributors: united states. forest service
Date: 2017
Subjects: public use, planning, management, trails, united states

Print format not distributed to depository libraries. Title from cover. "FS-1095b." "November 2017." Also available on the Internet as a PDF file. Description based on print version record; resource not viewed.
